title: North Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation collapse
historical_analogue: AMOC weakening 15% since 1950; 2023 studies show approaching tipping point
description: The Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation weakens dramatically, causing Northwestern Europe to cool 3-5°C over 5 years. UK growing season shortens by 6 weeks. Energy demand surges. Northern European agriculture faces permanent restructuring.
